body.title: Wire dev tools into Hubert fascia (Goals, Decisions, etc.)
body.result: 8 dev tool cards in Hubert fascia Settings box; 2-column grid layout; all existing routes unchanged (0b684f7d)
body.intention: I intend that Goals, Decisions, Hypotheses, Outcomes, Questions, Palace Browser, and Rack Health are accessible from Hubert's fascia page so they are never unreachable.
body.description:
Move the dev tool cards currently in Control Station (Goals, Decisions, Questions, Hypotheses, Outcomes, Palace Browser, Rack Health) into Hubert's fascia page. This must ship BEFORE T-control-station-breakers-only removes them from Control Station — otherwise there is a window where they are reachable from nowhere.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py (Hubert fascia content, card links)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Move the links/cards only — the underlying pages (/goals, /decisions, etc.) are unchanged. Hubert's fascia Settings box gets the dev tool cards.
**Completion criteria:** Opening Hubert's fascia tab shows all 6 dev tool links; each link resolves correctly.
**Validation:** Click each link from Hubert's tab — all 6 pages load.
**Observable via:** Manual navigation verification; no new log lines needed.
